title: aellenia auricula
intro: Aellenia auricula, also known as the auricula, is a plant species in the gentian family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aellenia auricula include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used in poultices and salves to aid in wound healing.
